## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / tool
- [ ] ThinkShield rule pack
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] Signed-off-by (DCO)
